notes: Gate: all 11 manifest entries approved + hash-current. Mechanical checks green: validate-guides, assemble-guide (guide.json merged cleanly), check-stable-ids (no baseline at main yet), validate-guides re-run after assembly.

QA verdict: NOT ready — 11 spine anomaly lines (10 locations) cite walkthrough hint-coin vocabulary the captured source does not contain. Root-cause hypothesis: sources/pl5-walkthrough holds only the 5 puzzle feed pages + index; the blog's hint-coin/location pages were never captured. Fix path: sources pass appends those pages, spine re-run re-verifies the 10 names (IDs must survive per §6.8), then re-review.

Verified honest by spot-read against sources: umbrella-location flags (route PDF p.1 names no location at run start), solution-screenshot flags (route conveys solutions as screenshots, e.g. puzzle 001 p.1), omitted-solution flags (data.json ch2-a031/ch4-a011/ch5-a079..081/ch8-a016..019 hold the inline answers the spine omitted). Aligned names Carnival Square, Madame Lapushka's, Norwell, Racetrack, Casino, Pumpkin Park, Akbadain B1-B7, Reunion Inn verified present in the walkthrough capture.

RA coverage: no ra-set source exists (RetroAchievements has no 3DS support) — zero achievements to map is deliberate, not an omission. Images: no layer references images/. Missables: no spine step carries a missable flag (Any% route; the manual's Puzzle Palace recovers lost puzzles), so no deadlines are owed.

Widget layers: no flagged rows anywhere; counter derivedFrom (82) matches the 82 informational puzzle rows across the 9 chapter tables 1:1. The prepCard deck slot is deliberately unfilled (Pierre 2026-07-08).
Assembled guide.json withheld from this commit because QA did not pass; assembly itself succeeded and will be re-emitted on the next QA run.
